generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
prefix dtvocab: https://example.com/DTDFVocab

instance CraneStateSensor : dtvocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing crane state data from physical gantry crane"
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : dtvocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted from sensor",
    dtvocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : dtvocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted from physical system",
    dtvocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    dtvocab:inputTo LoggingApplication, TimescaleDB, VisualizationEnabler, ControlEnabler, ValidationEnabler
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisInsight : dtvocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical crane operation data for performance evaluation"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : dtvocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical crane state data to enable performance analysis",
    dtvocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : dtvocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visual representation of crane operational state for system monitoring"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : dtvocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of crane system status for monitoring",
    dtvocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlAction : dtvocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane control parameters for optimal performance",
    dtvocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalControlService : dtvocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing crane operation parameters based on real-time data",
    dtvocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : dtvocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming digital model fidelity with physical system behavior"
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : dtvocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of digital twin model accuracy against physical crane behavior",
    dtvocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationInsight : dtvocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual diagram of digital twin system components and relationships"
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationService : dtvocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing visual representation of digital twin architecture",
    dtvocab:provides ArchitectureVisualizationInsight
]

instance LoggingApplication : dtvocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based application processing crane state data and logging to TimescaleDB",
    dtvocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : dtvocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane state data",
    dtvocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : dtvocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time visualization of crane operations",
    dtvocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ControlEnabler : dtvocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control algorithms",
    dtvocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : dtvocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous model validation",
    dtvocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DeploymentVM : dtvocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual machine image for easy deployment and testing of digital twin",
    dtvocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationEnabler : dtvocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for visualizing system architecture using C4 model",
    dtvocab:enables ArchitectureVisualizationService
]

instance CraneBehavioralModel : dtvocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model representing gantry crane dynamics for simulation and validation",
    dtvocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler, ControlEnabler
]

instance C4Model : dtvocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 architecture model for visualizing digital twin system structure",
    dtvocab:inputTo ArchitectureVisualizationEnabler
]

instance PhysicalCrane : dtvocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane in laboratory research environment"
]

instance CraneController : dtvocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component managing physical crane operations"
]

instance LabEnvironment : dtvocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) uses the Physical Crane Interface to send control commands to the Physical Crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system adopts an ad-hoc architectural approach utilizing containerization for deployment, with the C4 Model employed to visualize architecture via context and container diagrams."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via an MQTT broker for signaling, as depicted in the container diagram. The network topology includes the MQTT Broker connecting the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and other components. Specific bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker facilitates data exchange between physical sensors and digital components, AutomationML standards ensure interoperable digital twin modeling, and Microsoft Azure tools are utilized for cloud-based pipeline implementation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standard is utilized in the Air Quality Management exemplar for digital twin modeling; other exemplars adopt ad-hoc approaches without adherence to specific industry standards."
]
